title: Participate in workplace health and safety processes
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Participate in workplace health and safety processes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Follow workplace procedures for hazard identification and risk control

pcs.text: Recognise and report workplace health and safety hazards to designated personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and report workplace health and safety hazards to designated personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and report workplace health and safety hazards to designated personnel.

pcs.text: Assess risks associated with identified workplace health and safety hazards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess risks associated with identified workplace health and safety hazards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess risks associated with identified workplace health and safety hazards.

pcs.text: Follow workplace procedures and work instructions to control risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace procedures and work instructions to control risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace procedures and work instructions to control risks.

pcs.text: Follow workplace procedures for dealing with near misses, incidents, fire and emergencies within the scope of own responsibilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace procedures for dealing with near misses, incidents, fire and emergencies within the scope of own responsibilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace procedures for dealing with near misses, incidents, fire and emergencies within the scope of own responsibilities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Follow workplace procedures for hazard identification and risk control

elements.title: Follow safe practices during work operations

pcs.text: Recognise and carry out worker responsibilities prescribed in workplace health and safety procedures, legislation, regulations and codes of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and carry out worker responsibilities prescribed in workplace health and safety procedures, legislation, regulations and codes of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and carry out worker responsibilities prescribed in workplace health and safety procedures, legislation, regulations and codes of practice.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use, maintain and store personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use, maintain and store personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use, maintain and store personal protective equipment (PPE).

pcs.text: Identify and report hazards and assess risk to work operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report hazards and assess risk to work operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report hazards and assess risk to work operations.

pcs.text: Access workplace health and safety information as required to mitigate risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access workplace health and safety information as required to mitigate risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access workplace health and safety information as required to mitigate risks.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Follow safe practices during work operations

elements.title: Participate in arrangements for maintaining the health and safety of all people in the workplace

pcs.text: Undertake workplace health and safety training as directed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake workplace health and safety training as directed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake workplace health and safety training as directed.

pcs.text: Contribute to workplace health and safety participative arrangements in the workplace within the scope of own responsibilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Contribute to workplace health and safety participative arrangements in the workplace within the scope of own responsibilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Contribute to workplace health and safety participative arrangements in the workplace within the scope of own responsibilities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Participate in arrangements for maintaining the health and safety of all people in the workplace

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
